relation_definitions.accountableBy: The subject entity is organizationally accountable or responsible by the object entity.
relation_definitions.accountableFor: The subject entity is responsible for or must ensure the proper management of the aspect or task specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.achievedBy: The subject entity is accomplished or realized through the process or method specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.achieves: The subject entity accomplishes or attains the objective or outcome specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.across: The subject entity extends over or is applicable throughout the scope or range specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.actsAs: The subject entity functions or serves in the capacity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.advisedBy: The subject entity receives guidance or recommendations from the person or role specified by the object entity, without implying direct control.
relation_definitions.affected: The subject entity has an impact on or influences the object entity in some way.
relation_definitions.affectedBy: The subject entity is influenced or impacted by the object entity.
relation_definitions.affects: The subject entity has an influence on or causes an impact to the object entity.
relation_definitions.affectsOrDrives: The subject entity influences, initiates, or causes the creation or development of the object entity.
relation_definitions.alignedWith: The subject entity corresponds to, supports, or is consistent with the concept, phase, or framework specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.aligns: The subject entity arranges or adjusts itself to be consistent or in agreement with the object entity.
relation_definitions.alignsWith: The subject entity is consistent with, corresponds to, or follows the principles, standards, or guidelines specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.allowedOnlyWith: The subject entity is permitted or authorized only if the condition or requirement specified by the object entity is met.
relation_definitions.analyzes: The subject entity examines or studies the object entity in detail.
relation_definitions.anchoredIn: The subject entity is based in, established within, or connected to the object entity.
relation_definitions.and: The subject entity is connected with or combined with the object entity.
relation_definitions.applicableTo: The subject entity is relevant or can be applied to the category, class, or type represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.appliesAcross: The subject entity extends over, covers, or is relevant throughout the scope or range specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.appliesTo: The subject entity is relevant to, associated with, or has applicability in the domain or field specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.applyTo: The subject entity is relevant to or is used in the context of the object entity.
relation_definitions.archivedAfter: The subject entity is stored or moved to archive status following the time period or condition specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.archivedIf: The subject entity is archived or made inactive if the condition specified by the object entity is met.
relation_definitions.assesses: The subject entity evaluates, examines, or judges the object entity.
relation_definitions.assignedAs: The subject entity is designated or appointed to the role or responsibility specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.assignedAt: The subject entity is assigned or allocated at the level or location specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.assignedBy: The subject entity is designated or appointed by the object entity.
relation_definitions.assignedTo: The responsibility or task represented by the subject entity is designated or delegated to the person, group, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.assignedVia: The subject entity is designated, allocated, or appointed through the means or mechanism specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.assigns: The subject entity designates, allocates, or attributes the object entity to a particular purpose, function, or position.
relation_definitions.associatedWith: The subject entity is connected or related to the object entity in a general or unspecified manner.
relation_definitions.attributedTo: The subject entity is assigned or credited to the object entity.
relation_definitions.avoids: The subject entity prevents or reduces the occurrence of the condition or situation specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.basedOn: The subject entity is founded upon, derived from, or uses the principles or structure of the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.benefitsFrom: The subject entity gains advantages or positive outcomes from the object entity.
relation_definitions.between: The subject entity is related to or involves a relationship connecting the two entities specified by the object entity and another entity implied in the context.
relation_definitions.bridges: The subject entity acts as a link or connection between itself and the object entity, facilitating interaction or integration.
relation_definitions.bundles: The subject entity groups together or combines the object entity into a single unit.
relation_definitions.canBe: The subject entity is capable of being classified or identified as the type or category specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.canBeAddedWith: The subject entity can be added or included when accompanied by or supported with the object entity.
relation_definitions.canBeArchivedIf: The subject entity can be archived, stored, or removed if the condition specified by the object entity is true.
relation_definitions.canBeAssigned: The subject entity can have the object entity assigned or associated with it.
relation_definitions.canBeAssignedAs: The subject entity can be assigned or designated in the role or capacity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.canBeAssignedTo: The subject entity can be assigned to or associated with the object entity.
relation_definitions.canBeLinkedTo: The subject entity can be connected or associated with the object entity.
relation_definitions.canBeModeledAt: The subject entity can be modeled or represented at the level or scope specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.canBeSetTo: The subject entity is able to be assigned or configured to the value or state specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.canChange: The subject entity is capable of undergoing or causing a change in the object entity.
relation_definitions.canCreate: The subject entity has the ability or permission to create the object entity.
relation_definitions.canHaveRole: The subject entity can have or assume the role specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.canShift: The subject entity is capable of moving, transferring, or being reassigned to the object entity.
relation_definitions.cannotBeLinkedTo: The subject entity is not allowed to be connected or associated with the object entity.
relation_definitions.captures: The subject entity identifies or encompasses the needs, requirements, or characteristics specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.causedBy: The subject entity is the result or effect of the cause specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.checksFor: The subject entity performs a verification or search for the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.classifiedAs: The subject entity is categorized or identified as the type or class specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.classifies: The subject entity assigns the object entity to a category or group based on shared characteristics.
relation_definitions.collaboratesWith: The subject entity works together or cooperates with the object entity in a joint effort or activity.
relation_definitions.composedOf: The subject entity consists of or is made up of the entities specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.connectedTo: The subject entity is linked or associated with the object entity in a way that indicates a connection or relationship between them.
relation_definitions.connects: The subject entity links or joins with the object entity, establishing a relationship or interaction.
relation_definitions.connectsTo: The subject entity establishes a link or connection to the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.consistsOf: The subject entity is made up of or includes the object entity as a component or part.
relation_definitions.consumedBy: The subject entity is used, utilized, or operated by the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.consumes: The subject entity uses or makes use of the object entity, typically referring to the subject accessing or interacting with the object.
relation_definitions.contactedDuring: The subject entity is contacted or communicated with during the event or process specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.contains: The subject entity includes, encompasses, or governs the object entity as a part or subordinate element.
relation_definitions.contextOf: The subject entity exists within or is related to the broader domain, environment, or framework specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.contextualizedWithin: The subject entity is placed or understood within the context or framework specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.continuesUpTo: The subject entity extends or progresses until it reaches the level or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.contrastedWith: The subject entity is compared to the object entity to highlight differences or distinctions.
relation_definitions.contributesTo: The subject entity plays a part in achieving or realizing the outcome or goal specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.covers: The subject entity includes, encompasses, or applies to the scope specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.createdBy: The subject entity is produced, generated, or brought into existence by the agent, process, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.createdDuring: The subject entity is created or comes into existence during the time, event, or process specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.createdFor: The subject entity is created for the purpose or use of the object entity.
relation_definitions.createdIf: The subject entity is created or initiated if the condition or event specified by the object entity occurs.
relation_definitions.createdIn: The subject entity is created or originates within the environment or tool specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.createdVia: The subject entity is created or established through the method or process specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.creates: The subject entity brings about or results in the formation of the object entity.
relation_definitions.definedAt: The subject entity is defined, established, or determined at the level or context specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.definedBy: The subject entity is defined or specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.definedIn: The subject entity is specified, established, or described within the document, framework, or guidelines represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.definedWithin: The subject entity exists or is specified within the context or scope of the object entity.
relation_definitions.defines: The subject entity establishes, specifies, or determines the nature or characteristics of the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.delivers: The subject entity provides, supplies, or produces the service, functionality, or outcome specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.dependsOn: The subject entity’s existence, status, or condition is influenced or determined by the object entity.
relation_definitions.derivedFrom: The subject entity originates from, is based on, or is obtained from the object entity.
relation_definitions.describes: The subject entity provides a description or characterization of the attribute, type, or concept specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.designedToAchieve: The subject entity is intended or created to accomplish the goal or outcome specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.detects: The subject entity discovers or uncovers the object entity, often something that is missing or not obvious.
relation_definitions.developedBy: The subject entity is created, built, or maintained by the person, group, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.developedOrProvidedBy: The subject entity is created, developed, or supplied by the object entity.
relation_definitions.developedWithin: The subject entity is created or built inside the organizational or structural context specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.distinctFrom: The subject entity is different from or not the same as the object entity in nature or characteristics.
relation_definitions.distinguishes: The subject entity differentiates or makes a clear distinction between the object entity and other entities or concepts.
relation_definitions.dividedInto: The subject entity is separated or split into the parts or components specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.documentedBy: The subject entity is described or recorded in the document or medium specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.documentedThrough: The subject entity is recorded, described, or represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.documents: The subject entity creates, maintains, or records the object entity as part of its activities or responsibilities.
relation_definitions.doesNotProvide: The subject entity fails to supply or offer the quality, information, or value specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.doneVia: The action or process involving the subject entity is carried out through or by means of the object entity.
relation_definitions.embeddedWithin: The subject entity is contained or integrated within the object entity, indicating that it exists as part of or inside the object entity.
relation_definitions.enables: The subject entity makes it possible for the process, activity, or condition specified by the object entity to occur or be achieved.
relation_definitions.enablesIntegrationBetween: The subject entity facilitates or enables integration or data exchange between the object entities specified.
relation_definitions.ensuredBy: The subject entity is guaranteed or made certain through the means or method specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.ensures: The subject entity guarantees or makes certain the occurrence or presence of the quality, condition, or concept specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.equivalentTo: The subject entity is considered equal or synonymous with the object entity in meaning or function.
relation_definitions.essentialFor: The subject entity is necessary or crucial for the achievement or existence of the object entity.
relation_definitions.essentialTo: The subject entity is necessary or indispensable for the occurrence, functioning, or existence of the object entity.
relation_definitions.exchangesDataWith: The subject entity exchanges or transfers data with the object entity.
relation_definitions.excludedFrom: The subject entity is not included in or is deliberately left out of the scope or category specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.excludes: The subject entity does not include or contain the element or aspect specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.existsBetween: The subject entity occurs or is present as a relationship or connection between the entities specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.expectedToNominate: The subject entity is anticipated or required to select or appoint the object entity.
relation_definitions.explains: The subject entity provides an explanation or description of the process, concept, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.exportedAs: The subject entity is represented or categorized as the object entity when exported.
relation_definitions.exportedFrom: The subject entity originates or is sent out from the object entity.
relation_definitions.exportedTo: The subject entity is sent or transferred to the object entity, typically for further use or processing.
relation_definitions.extendedBy: The subject entity is expanded, enhanced, or supplemented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.extendedWith: The subject entity is supplemented or enhanced by the addition of the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.facilitates: The subject entity makes it easier or helps the process or state described by the object entity.
relation_definitions.focusesOn: The subject entity concentrates on or emphasizes the aspect specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.follows: The subject entity adheres to or is guided by the process, method, or procedure specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.followsProcedure: The subject entity is created, managed, or handled according to the process or method specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.for: The subject entity is related to, responsible for, or associated with the object entity in the specified context.
relation_definitions.forDefining: The subject entity provides a basis or framework for defining the object entity.
relation_definitions.forStructuring: The subject entity provides a basis or framework for structuring the object entity.
relation_definitions.forms: The subject entity collectively creates, constitutes, or results in the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.formsPartOf: The subject entity constitutes a part or component of the object entity.
relation_definitions.formsTogetherWith: The subject entity combines or works together with the object entity to form a larger or composite entity or concept.
relation_definitions.from: The subject entity indicates the starting point, source, or origin with respect to the object entity.
relation_definitions.fulfills: The subject entity satisfies or accomplishes the goal, purpose, or mission specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.functionsAs: The subject entity performs the role or function specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.grantsPermissionTo: The subject entity provides or allows the permission or authorization to the object entity.
relation_definitions.groupedBy: The subject entity is organized or categorized under the grouping specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.guides: The subject entity directs, influences, or leads the actions or development of the object entity.
relation_definitions.handledBy: The subject entity is managed, executed, or carried out by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasAspect: The subject entity includes or possesses the aspect or characteristic specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasAttribute: The subject entity possesses or is characterized by the property or feature specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasCategory: The subject entity belongs to or is associated with the category specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasCertification: The subject entity holds or possesses the certification or compliance status specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasCharacteristic: The subject entity possesses or exhibits the characteristic or feature specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasChildType: The subject entity includes or contains the object entity as a child type or subtype within its hierarchy or classification.
relation_definitions.hasConsumer: The subject entity is used or consumed by the object entity, indicating that the object acts as a user or client of the subject.
relation_definitions.hasCorePurpose: The subject entity possesses the core purpose or main objective specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasDependency: The subject entity relies on or is dependent upon the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasDirection: The subject entity has the orientation, course, or flow specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasDuty: The subject entity has the responsibility or obligation to perform the action or task specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasFactSheet: The subject entity includes or is associated with the fact sheet specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasField: The subject entity contains or possesses the field specified by the object entity as one of its attributes or components.
relation_definitions.hasFrequency: The subject entity takes place or is repeated at the rate or interval specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasImpactOn: The subject entity affects or influences the state, condition, or outcome of the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasInterdependencyWith: The subject entity has a mutual dependence or relationship with the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasKnown: The subject entity is associated with or has a known instance of the object entity, such as a person or organization related to it.
relation_definitions.hasLifecycle: The subject entity undergoes or is characterized by the lifecycle specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasMilestone: The subject entity includes or contains the milestone specified by the object entity as part of its progression or timeline.
relation_definitions.hasNature: The subject entity possesses the characteristic, quality, or inherent attribute specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasOperationalIndependence: The subject entity possesses the operational independence characteristic described by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasProperty: The subject entity possesses or exhibits the characteristic or attribute specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasProvider: The subject entity is provided or supplied by the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasRelation: The subject entity has or is associated with the relation specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasRelationField: The subject entity possesses or includes the relation field specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasRelationship: The subject entity possesses or is associated with the type of relationship specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasResponsibility: The subject entity has the responsibility or duty to manage, oversee, or ensure the aspect specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasResponsiblePerson: The subject entity has a person assigned who is responsible for it, indicating accountability or oversight by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasRole: The subject entity is assigned or associated with the role specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasStakeholder: The subject entity involves or includes the stakeholder specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasStatus: The subject entity possesses or is characterized by the status or condition specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasStrategicRole: The subject entity fulfills or is associated with the strategic role specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasSubscription: The subject entity includes or is associated with the object entity through a subscription relationship.
relation_definitions.hasSubtype: The subject entity includes or is divided into the subtype specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasSuccessor: The subject entity is succeeded or replaced by the object entity in a given role or responsibility.
relation_definitions.hasSupportType: The subject entity has the type of support specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasTag: The subject entity is labeled or marked with the tag specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasTechnicalImplementation: The subject entity is implemented or realized through the technical component specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasType: The subject entity belongs to or is classified under the category, kind, or type specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasValue: The subject entity holds or is assigned the value specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasVendor: The subject entity is associated with or provided by the vendor specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasVersion: The subject entity possesses or is associated with the version specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.hasVersionTransition: The subject entity undergoes a version transition involving the object entity.
relation_definitions.helpsEnsure: The subject entity contributes to achieving or maintaining the condition or outcome specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.helpsIdentify: The subject entity assists in recognizing or discovering the entity or characteristic specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.helpsOptimize: The subject entity assists in improving or making the object entity more efficient or effective.
relation_definitions.helpsReduce: The subject entity assists in decreasing or minimizing the object entity.
relation_definitions.helpsStructure: The subject entity assists in organizing or arranging the object entity in a meaningful or systematic way.
relation_definitions.identifiedBy: The subject entity is recognized, defined, or specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.identifiedFor: The subject entity is recognized or designated in relation to the object entity, often for purposes such as responsibility or association.
relation_definitions.identifiedThrough: The subject entity is recognized, determined, or established by the process, event, or method specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.identifies: The subject entity recognizes, determines, or specifies the entity or entities indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.impacts: The subject entity has an effect on or influences the state, condition, or performance of the object entity.
relation_definitions.impactsOrEnables: The subject entity has an effect on or facilitates the function or existence of the object entity.
relation_definitions.implementedBy: The subject entity is technically realized or carried out by the object entity.
relation_definitions.implements: The subject entity carries out, realizes, or puts into effect the function, capability, or specification represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.importedFrom: The subject entity is received or brought in from the object entity.
relation_definitions.importedTo: The subject entity is received or brought into the object entity.
relation_definitions.importedVia: The subject entity is imported or brought in through the process or system specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.improves: The subject entity makes the quality or condition specified by the object entity better or more effective.
relation_definitions.includes: The subject entity contains, comprises, or is made up of the object entity as one of its parts or components.
relation_definitions.independentOf: The subject entity exists or functions without reliance on or connection to the object entity.
relation_definitions.independentlyDeployable: The subject entity can be deployed, operated, or released on its own without dependency on other entities, as indicated by the object entity (typically a boolean value).
relation_definitions.indicates: The subject entity signifies, represents, or points to the concept or event specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.inferredVia: The subject entity can be deduced or derived through the object entity.
relation_definitions.influencedByOrDependentOn: The subject entity is affected by, relies on, or requires the object entity for its functioning or existence.
relation_definitions.informedAbout: The subject entity is kept informed about or receives information regarding the object entity.
relation_definitions.inheritsFrom: The subject entity derives or receives context, attributes, or structure from the object entity.
relation_definitions.inheritsResponsibilityFrom: The subject entity receives or derives responsibility from the object entity.
relation_definitions.integratedWith: The subject entity is combined or connected with the object entity to work together or function as a unified system.
relation_definitions.integrates: The subject entity combines or brings together the object entity as part of a unified whole.
relation_definitions.integratesWith: The subject entity is integrated or connected with the object entity to work together or function as part of a system.
relation_definitions.interactsWith: The subject entity engages in interaction or communication with the object entity.
relation_definitions.interconnectedThrough: The subject entity is connected or linked to other entities through the means specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.interrelatesWith: The subject entity has a mutual or reciprocal relationship or connection with the object entity.
relation_definitions.involvedIn: The subject entity participates in or is associated with the object entity.
relation_definitions.involves: The subject entity includes or requires the participation of the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.involvesClassificationOf: The subject entity includes the process or activity of classifying or categorizing the object entity.
relation_definitions.is: The subject entity is an instance or example of the type or category specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isA: The subject entity is a specific instance or subtype of the category or class specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isCentralModelingObjectAcross: The subject entity serves as the main or core modeling element throughout the object entity.
relation_definitions.isConceptIn: The subject entity is a concept or element that exists within the domain, field, or context specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isDefinedIn: The subject entity is specified, described, or established within the document, framework, or guidelines represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isElementOf: The subject entity is a component or part of the larger entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isGoverned: The subject entity is managed, controlled, or regulated according to the rules or policies represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isHigherLevelGroupingOf: The subject entity represents a higher-level grouping or categorization that includes the object entity.
relation_definitions.isHigherLevelGroupingThan: The subject entity is a broader or more general category compared to the object entity, which is a more specific or lower-level grouping.
relation_definitions.isIndustryAgnostic: The subject entity is not specific to or limited by any particular industry, as indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isIndustryIndependent: The subject entity is not limited to or dependent on any particular industry as indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isLinkedTo: The subject entity has a connection or association with the object entity.
relation_definitions.isLogicalBundleOf: The subject entity is a conceptual grouping or collection that consists of the object entity.
relation_definitions.isMandatoryFor: The subject entity is required or compulsory for the category, type, or entity represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isModeledIn: The subject entity is modeled or represented within the context specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isNotModeledAs: The subject entity is not represented or modeled as the object entity.
relation_definitions.isPartOf: The subject entity forms a component or subset of the larger whole specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isPerson: The subject entity is a person, as indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isPrimaryReferenceObjectFor: The subject entity acts as the main or principal reference for the object entity.
relation_definitions.isResponsibleFor: The subject entity has the duty or obligation to manage, oversee, or be accountable for the object entity.
relation_definitions.isSelfContained: The subject entity is technically and logically independent or enclosed within the boundaries specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isSmallestModelableUnit: The subject entity represents the smallest unit that can be modeled within the object entity.
relation_definitions.isStableOverTime: The subject entity remains relatively stable or unchanged over the period specified or indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isSubtypeOf: The subject entity is a subtype or more specific category of the object entity.
relation_definitions.isTechnologyNeutral: The subject entity does not depend on or is not specific to any particular technology, as indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isTimeBound: The subject entity has a temporal constraint or deadline as specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isTraceable: The subject entity can be tracked or followed in terms of its origin, usage, or changes as indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isTypeOf: The subject entity is a specific type or category within the broader class specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.isVersionOf: The subject entity is a version or edition of the object entity.
relation_definitions.isVisible: The subject entity is observable or can be seen as indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.linkedAs: The subject entity is connected or associated with the object entity in the specified manner.
relation_definitions.linkedBy: The subject entity is connected or associated with the object entity through a specified type of link or relationship.
relation_definitions.linkedTo: The subject entity is connected or related to the object entity through a direct or indirect association.
relation_definitions.linkedVia: The subject entity is connected or associated with the object entity through a linking mechanism.
relation_definitions.links: The subject entity establishes a connection or relationship with the object entity.
relation_definitions.linksTo: The subject entity is connected or associated with the object entity through a linkage or reference.
relation_definitions.madeAt: The subject entity is created, performed, or carried out at the place, level, or time specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.madeFromPerspectiveOf: The subject entity is created, assigned, or considered from the viewpoint or standpoint of the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.maintainedFor: The subject entity is maintained for the purpose or use of the object entity.
relation_definitions.maintainedIn: The subject entity is managed, updated, or maintained within the environment or tool specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.maintains: The subject entity preserves, upholds, or keeps the object entity in a desired state.
relation_definitions.managedBy: The subject entity is managed or overseen by the person or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.managedVia: The subject entity is controlled, governed, or handled through the method or mechanism specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.managedWithin: The subject entity is overseen, controlled, or administered within the organizational unit or structure specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.manages: The subject entity is responsible for controlling, overseeing, or administering the object entity.
relation_definitions.mandatoryFor: The subject entity is required or compulsory for the category, type, or entity represented by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayBe: The subject entity can optionally be the object entity or have the state specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayBeCreatedIndependentlyOf: The subject entity can be created or exist without being dependent on the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayBeEmpty: The subject entity can optionally be left empty or unset to achieve the condition or purpose specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayBeModeledAs: The subject entity can be represented or considered as the object entity under certain conditions.
relation_definitions.mayBeSubjectTo: The subject entity can potentially be governed by, affected by, or required to comply with the object entity, such as agreements or targets.
relation_definitions.mayBeSupportedBy: The subject entity can be supported or maintained by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayCreate: The subject entity is allowed or able to create the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayExpose: The subject entity can optionally make available or provide access to the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayExtend: The subject entity has the ability or permission to extend or add to the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayHave: The subject entity can have or be associated with the object entity, but it is not necessarily always the case.
relation_definitions.mayHaveAttribute: The subject entity can possess or be characterized by the attribute specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayInclude: The subject entity can optionally include or be linked to the object entity as part of its composition or related elements.
relation_definitions.mayIncur: The subject entity can potentially cause or involve the object entity, such as costs or expenses.
relation_definitions.mayInvolve: The subject entity may involve or include the object entity as part of its scope or participants.
relation_definitions.mayLinkTo: The subject entity can optionally be linked to the object entity to establish an association that is not mandatory but may provide additional context or relevance.
relation_definitions.mayNotBeLinkedTo: The subject entity might not be connected or associated with the object entity.
relation_definitions.mayRepresent: The subject entity can stand for, symbolize, or be an example of the object entity.
relation_definitions.meets: The subject entity satisfies, fulfills, or conforms to the requirements or criteria specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.modeledAs: The subject entity is represented or depicted in the form or manner specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.modeledBetween: The subject entity is represented or defined as existing between the two object entities.
relation_definitions.modeledBy: The subject entity is represented, described, or structured according to the modeling approach or guideline specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.modeledByLinking: The subject entity is represented or defined through a connection to the object entity.
relation_definitions.modeledIn: The subject entity is represented, described, or structured within the context or framework specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.modeledUsing: The subject entity is created, developed, or represented using the method, framework, or guidelines specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.modeledWithin: The subject entity is modeled, developed, or represented within the context or scope specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.models: The subject entity represents, describes, or is used to depict the concept or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustBe: The subject entity is required or obligated to be in the state or undergo the process specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustBeDocumented: The subject entity is required to be recorded or documented within the context or framework specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustBeLinkedTo: The subject entity is required to be connected or associated with the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustBeModeledAt: The subject entity is required to be modeled or represented at the level or scope specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustBeSpecifiedAt: The subject entity is required to have a specification or assignment at the level or location indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustBeUpdated: The subject entity requires updating or maintenance as specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustComplyWith: The subject entity is required to follow or adhere to the rules, standards, or guidelines specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustHave: The subject entity is required to have or be associated with the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustInclude: The subject entity is required to contain or incorporate the object entity as part of its content or components.
relation_definitions.mustInvolve: The subject entity requires the participation or involvement of the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustNotBeUsedIn: The subject entity is prohibited from being used or included in the context or activity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.mustNotHave: The subject entity is required to not possess or include the object entity.
relation_definitions.namedBy: The subject entity is named or identified using the element specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.notAssignedAt: The subject entity is not assigned or allocated at the level or location specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.notEqualTo: The subject entity is explicitly stated to be different from or not the same as the object entity.
relation_definitions.notModeledAs: The subject entity is not represented or modeled as the type specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.notModeledIn: The subject entity is not modeled or represented within the system or context specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.notModeledOn: The subject entity is not represented or included in the object entity.
relation_definitions.notRefersTo: The subject entity does not denote, indicate, or associate with the concept or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.notTiedTo: The subject entity is not connected or related to the object entity in terms of dependency or association.
relation_definitions.notTypeOf: The subject entity is not a type or category of the object entity.
relation_definitions.notUsedBy: The subject entity is not utilized or operated by the person, group, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.occursAcross: The subject entity takes place or happens spanning the scope or domain specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.occursBetween: The subject entity takes place or happens between the entities specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.occursBy: The subject entity happens or takes place through the method, manner, or mode specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.of: The subject entity belongs to, is a characteristic of, or is related to the object entity.
relation_definitions.operatedBy: The subject entity is run, maintained, or handled by the person, group, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.operatesIndependentlyOf: The subject entity functions without dependence on or influence from the object entity.
relation_definitions.optimizedBy: The subject entity is improved, enhanced, or made more efficient through the use or application of the object entity.
relation_definitions.optimizes: The subject entity improves the efficiency or effectiveness of the object entity.
relation_definitions.ownedBy: The subject entity is owned or controlled by the object entity.
relation_definitions.owns: The subject entity has accountability for or is responsible for the object entity.
relation_definitions.partOf: The subject entity is a component, segment, or subset of the larger entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.past: The subject entity has exceeded or gone beyond the condition or point specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.performedIn: The subject activity or action takes place within or is carried out using the tool, system, or environment specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.performs: The subject entity carries out or executes the action or process specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.plannedIn: The subject entity is scheduled, organized, or arranged within the context of the object entity.
relation_definitions.playsRoleIn: The subject entity has a function or role in the process, activity, or context specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.primaryImplementationOf: The subject entity is the main or primary implementation of the object entity.
relation_definitions.processes: The subject entity handles, manipulates, or operates on the type of data specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.promotes: The subject entity encourages or supports the occurrence or development of the object entity.
relation_definitions.providedBy: The subject entity is supplied, offered, or made available by the object entity.
relation_definitions.provides: The subject entity supplies, offers, or makes available the resource, information, or attribute specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.providesDataFor: The subject entity supplies or makes data available for the object entity.
relation_definitions.providesFunctionalityVia: The subject entity delivers its functions or features through the means or interface specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.providesGuidanceFor: The subject entity offers guidance or advice for the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.providesInputFor: The subject entity supplies information, data, or resources that support or assist the object entity.
relation_definitions.providesOrConsumes: The subject entity either offers or uses the object entity to exchange data or functionality.
relation_definitions.readOnlyIn: The subject entity can be accessed or viewed in the object entity but cannot be modified there.
relation_definitions.realizes: The subject entity brings about, implements, or makes use of the object entity to achieve a certain function or purpose.
relation_definitions.receives: The subject entity obtains or is given the object entity, such as information, notifications, or other items.
relation_definitions.receivesNotificationAbout: The subject entity receives notifications or alerts concerning the subject matter specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.reduces: The subject entity decreases or lessens the extent, amount, or severity of the condition or factor specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.refersTo: The subject entity denotes, indicates, or is associated with the concept or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.reflects: The subject entity represents, shows, or corresponds to the characteristics or attributes specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.relatedTo: The subject entity is connected or associated with the object entity in terms of topic, purpose, or function.
relation_definitions.relates: The subject entity is connected to or associated with the object entity in some way.
relation_definitions.relatesTo: The subject entity is connected or associated with the object entity in some way.
relation_definitions.relationship: The subject entity has the type of relationship specified by the object entity with another entity.
relation_definitions.relevantTo: The subject entity is related to, associated with, or important for the person, group, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.replaces: The subject entity takes the place of or succeeds the object entity, often indicating that the subject entity is a newer or updated version.
relation_definitions.representedBy: The subject entity is depicted, described, or embodied by the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.represents: The subject entity stands for, corresponds to, or exemplifies the concept or category specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.representsImplementationOf: The subject entity serves as an implementation or realization of the concept, function, or capability specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.requiredToMeet: The subject entity must satisfy or comply with the criteria or standards specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.requiredWhen: The subject entity becomes necessary or mandatory under the condition or circumstance specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.requires: The subject entity needs or depends on the object entity in order to fulfill a certain condition or purpose.
relation_definitions.responsibleFor: The subject entity has responsibility for the object entity, including oversight or accountability for its creation, maintenance, or management.
relation_definitions.responsibleForOrConsumes: The subject entity is responsible for or consumes the object entity in the context of their relationship.
relation_definitions.responsibleOrConsumedBy: The subject entity is managed, overseen, or utilized by the object entity.
relation_definitions.roleIncludes: The subject entity encompasses or involves the role or function specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.runsOn: The subject entity operates or functions on the platform or infrastructure specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.separates: The subject entity distinguishes or divides the object entity from another related entity or layer.
relation_definitions.serves: The subject entity provides service, support, or value to the object entity.
relation_definitions.servesAs: The subject entity functions or acts as the role or layer specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.servesAsFoundationFor: The subject entity acts as a base or underlying support for the development, operation, or existence of the object entity.
relation_definitions.shouldAvoid: The subject entity is advised not to have or engage in the condition or characteristic specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.showsRelationsBetween: The subject entity visually represents or displays the relationships between the object entities.
relation_definitions.sourcedFrom: The subject entity originates from or is obtained from the object entity.
relation_definitions.specifiedAt: The subject entity is assigned, designated, or identified at the level or location specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.specifies: The subject entity states or sets out the details, parameters, or criteria of the object entity.
relation_definitions.structuredAccordingTo: The subject entity is organized or arranged following the principles, guidelines, or standards specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.structuredBy: The subject entity is organized, arranged, or defined according to the structure specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.subjectTo: The subject entity is affected by or undergoes the action or condition specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.submittedVia: The subject entity is submitted or processed through the method or channel specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.suitableFor: The subject entity is appropriate or well-suited to be used with or in the context of the object entity.
relation_definitions.supplies: The subject entity provides or delivers the object entity, typically goods or services.
relation_definitions.supportedAcross: The subject entity is supported or present throughout the object entity, indicating coverage or distribution.
relation_definitions.supportedBy: The subject entity is supported, enabled, or facilitated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.supports: The subject entity provides assistance, enhancement, or facilitation to the process, strategy, or concept specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.synchronizedTo: The subject entity is actively synchronized or transferred to the object entity to keep data consistent or updated.
relation_definitions.synchronizedWith: The subject entity is regularly updated or kept consistent with the object entity through synchronization processes.
relation_definitions.taggedAs: The subject entity is labeled or marked with the tag or classification specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.targets: The subject entity is directed at, intended for, or focuses on the object entity.
relation_definitions.to: The subject entity indicates the endpoint, target, or direction toward the object entity.
relation_definitions.toward: The subject entity is directed at or aimed in the direction of the object entity.
relation_definitions.traceableWith: The subject entity can be tracked or followed using the object entity.
relation_definitions.traces: The subject entity follows, tracks, or identifies the connections or dependencies related to the object entity.
relation_definitions.trackedBy: The subject entity is monitored or followed through the process or system specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.typicallyIs: The subject entity is generally or commonly characterized as or identified with the object entity.
relation_definitions.understands: The subject entity comprehends or has knowledge of the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedAfter: The subject entity is utilized only following the occurrence or completion of the event or action specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedBy: The subject entity is utilized or employed by the person, group, or entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedFor: The subject entity is utilized or employed to achieve the purpose or perform the activity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedForLinkingIn: The subject entity is used for linking or connecting within the context or domain specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedIn: The subject entity is utilized or employed within the context, process, or system specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedTo: The subject entity is employed or utilized to perform the action or achieve the outcome specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedToDefine: The subject entity is utilized for defining or specifying the concept or entity indicated by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedToDetermineClassificationOf: The subject entity is used to determine the classification or category of the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedToImplement: The subject entity is utilized to carry out or execute the entity specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedToModel: The subject entity serves as a tool or means to represent or describe the object entity.
relation_definitions.usedWithin: The subject entity is utilized, employed, or functions inside the context, environment, or system specified by the object entity.
relation_definitions.uses: The subject entity employs, utilizes, or makes use of the object entity for a particular purpose.
relation_definitions.usesForLinking: The subject entity utilizes the object entity for the purpose of creating links or connections.
relation_definitions.usesOrRequires: The subject entity uses or requires the object entity to function or operate.
relation_definitions.usesRelation: The subject entity employs or makes use of the relation specified by the object entity to establish a connection or association.
relation_definitions.versionedBy: The subject entity is assigned a new version based on the change or criterion specified by the object entity.
